name: v1_hook_focus
description: Gen Z style hooks that grab attention immediately
content: Generate a LinkedIn post with a Gen Z style hook that stops the scroll. The hook should be provocative, relatable, or counterintuitive. Use conversational language, avoid corporate speak, and create an immediate emotional connection. Format the post with # separators between sections. The structure flows naturally with the hook leading into supporting content that validates the initial statement. Make the reader feel something within the first line.
